creator: ant_mail@inbox.ru
text:
[This bug was found on 12-STABLE and 13.1-RELEASE but there was no commits to the gjournal related to the bug so I think this affect all versions of FreeBSD.]

"gjournal stop" not working because after stop it immediately raised again because of autodetection (?) of changed device tree. Device tree changed because of(?) "gjournal stop" touching a device tree at least for removing ".journal" device.

The bug:

1>gjournal status
                                              Name  Status  Components
gptid/01ca652b-63b2-11ee-87ee-a0369fa4dce4.journal     N/A  gptid/01ca652b-63b2-11ee-87ee-a0369fa4dce4
                                                            gpt/lcl-gjj-m2

2>gjournal stop gptid/01ca652b-63b2-11ee-87ee-a0369fa4dce4
3>gjournal status

         Name  Status  Components
da0p1.journal     N/A  nvd1p2
                       da0p1

4>gjournal stop da0p1

5>gjournal status
                                              Name  Status  Components
gptid/01ca652b-63b2-11ee-87ee-a0369fa4dce4.journal     N/A  gptid/01ca652b-63b2-11ee-87ee-a0369fa4dce4
                                                            gpt/lcl-gjj-m2

Log between 1> and 2> :
